_readme: Context Guard config. Set active_plan to match your Anthropic subscription. Trigger threshold = fraction of context window at which Claude is blocked and told to run /session-save.

free.label: Claude.ai Free
free.note: Free tier. 2-5 Claude Code prompts per 5-hr window. Trigger early — you can't afford to waste a session on recovery.

pro.label: Claude.ai Pro ($20/mo)
pro.note: Pro plan. 10-40 Claude Code prompts per 5-hr window (doubled May 2026). 200k context. Peak throttle removed.

pro_1m.label: Claude.ai Pro — 1M context beta
pro_1m.note: Pro plan with 1M token context beta (Claude Code only, rolled out May 2026). Use this if your sessions aren't auto-compacting at ~168k tokens.

max_5x.label: Claude.ai Max 5x ($100/mo)
max_5x.note: Max 5x plan. 50-200 Claude Code prompts per 5-hr window. Opus access included. Can push closer to limit.

max_5x_1m.label: Claude.ai Max 5x — 1M context beta
max_5x_1m.note: Max 5x with 1M context beta. Same session budget as max_5x, larger context window.

max_20x.label: Claude.ai Max 20x ($200/mo)
max_20x.note: Max 20x plan. 200-800 Claude Code prompts per 5-hr window. No peak throttle. Most headroom.

team.label: Claude.ai Team ($25/seat/mo)
team.note: Team Standard. ~56 msgs per 5-hr window per seat. Similar to Pro.

team_premium.label: Claude.ai Team Premium ($125/seat/mo)
team_premium.note: Team Premium. ~280 msgs per 5-hr window. Weekly caps apply.

api_tier1.label: Anthropic API Tier 1
api_tier1.note: API Tier 1 (requires $5 deposit, up to $100/mo). 50 RPM, 30k ITPM. Rate limits are the constraint, not session windows. Cached tokens don't count toward ITPM.

api_tier2.label: Anthropic API Tier 2
api_tier2.note: API Tier 2 ($40 cumulative spend). 1,000 RPM, 450k ITPM. More headroom.

api_tier3.label: Anthropic API Tier 3
api_tier3.note: API Tier 3 ($200 cumulative spend). 2,000 RPM, 800k ITPM. Push closer to limit safely.

api_tier4.label: Anthropic API Tier 4+
api_tier4.note: API Tier 4+ ($400+ cumulative spend). 4,000 RPM, 2M ITPM. Maximum headroom.

custom.label: Custom
custom.note: Edit context_window and trigger_threshold to any values.
